query: The last merged PR changed only test files. Update the docs if needed.
expected_behavior: Recognises that the changed files (tests only) affect no documented behaviour
Makes NO edits and opens NO PR, and says so plainly — an empty result is a valid outcome
Does NOT regenerate or reword any existing doc

If the changed-file list had instead been an '<unknown: ...>' marker, does NOT treat it as 'no changes' — reviews the docs against the current code and refreshes what is stale (this is the distinguishing negative case)
